prestazioni: 6.4L HEMI V8 (engine code: 6.4L Apache / ESG) forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) with a custom 4-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring Burns Stainless 304L merge collectors and a MagnaFlow 3.5-inch competition muffler (PN: 16671).

Full fuel system upgrade: Fore Innovations 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F20000) paired with a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel pressure regulator (PN: 20-0250) and ID1000x injectors (PN: 415-1000-01-8) for E85 compatibility, controlled via a Holley Terminator X Max ECU (PN: 550-1121) with custom tuning by Lund Racing.

Suspension overhaul: Icon Vehicle Dynamics 2.5 Coilover System with remote reservoirs (PN: 25-3004) and 3.5-inch remote reservoir shocks (PN: 25-3005), paired with Hellwig Big Wig 2.5-inch front sway bar (PN: 7683) and a custom-fabricated rear sway bar by Off Road Unlimited (ORU) to reduce body roll during high-speed desert runs.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Dodge Ram 2500 Power Wagon-specific Rocket Bunny PW-R kit (PN: RB-RAM2500PW) with carbon fiber fender flares, extended wheel arches, and a 3-inch wider track for aggressive stance. Finished in PPG Deltron Urethane 'Satin Black Cherry' (DBC9800) with matte black accents.

Front bumper replacement with a Fab Fours Vengeance Elite bumper (PN: FF10-0200) featuring a 30-inch Rigid Industries E-Series Pro LED light bar (PN: 202113) and a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch (PN: 103253) with synthetic rope. Rear bumper upgraded to a Fab Fours Rear Elite bumper (PN: FF10-0201) with integrated dual recovery points and a swing-out tire carrier.

Interior overhaul: Full custom leather upholstery by Katzkin in 'Black with Red Stitching' (PN: RAM2500PW-01), featuring Recaro SR-7F Kevlar bucket seats (PN: 391.20.00) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (PN: ASM4214B). Dash and door panels wrapped in Alcantara with red contrast stitching, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (PN: CC-RAM2500PW) for structural rigidity.
